events.context: Non-linear Markov chains with memristive conductance. 8 components, 34 tests passing, feature-gated GPU/reservoir/FFI. SP1 of 3 (SP2: ix-music, SP3: ga integration). Inspired by Karpathy autoresearch + Tymoczko OPTIC.

effectiveness.proposition: The memristive-markov crate provides non-linear Markov chain capabilities for ix
